backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, global counter, leaderboard, image uploads with blob storage, and access control using Internet Identity authentication.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping 11 feature requirements to their implementing files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React files including components, hooks, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining dark theme variables for background, foreground, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Caffeine Capability Test application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component with header, authentication, profile setup modal, and grid layout displaying 11 feature test cards with footer.
frontend/src/components/ApiRouteTest.tsx: Feature card component that calls the Motoko backend's testJsonResponse method and displays the returned JSON string.
frontend/src/components/AuthenticationTe: Feature card displaying Internet Identity authentication status, user profile name, and principal ID when logged in.
frontend/src/components/CrossDeviceSyncT: React component that displays and increments a global counter stored in the Motoko backend, requiring Internet Identity authentication to interact with the shared counter.
frontend/src/components/EmailCapabilityT: React component that generates mailto: links with pre-populated subject and body fields based on user input (name and message), demonstrating email client integration.
frontend/src/components/ExternalApiFetch: React component that fetches data from a public REST API (JSONPlaceholder) to demonstrate frontend HTTP request capabilities, with error handling and loading states.
frontend/src/components/FeatureCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays feature tests with title, description, status badge (PASS/LOCAL-ONLY/NOT SUPPORTED), optional explanation, and children content.
frontend/src/components/FileUploadTest.t: React component for uploading images to the Motoko backend with preview, progress tracking, and a global gallery displaying all uploaded images from all users.
React component that allows authenticated users to submit leaderboard entries (name and score) and displays the top 5 scores from the global Motoko backend.
frontend/src/components/LocalPersistence: React component implementing a todo list using browser localStorage for persistence, with add and clear functionality demonstrating local data storage.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: React component providing Internet Identity login/logout functionality with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog component that prompts new users to enter their name for profile setup, blocking interaction until completed.
frontend/src/components/RealTimeTest.tsx: React component displaying a NOT SUPPORTED status for WebSocket/real-time features, explaining that Internet Computer doesn't support WebSockets and suggesting polling alternatives.
frontend/src/components/UrlStateTest.tsx: React component that reads and displays URL query parameters, with special handling to unlock a hidden section when ?code=237 is present.
frontend/src/components/VersionDeployTes: React component displaying app version (v1.0), environment info, and an editable changelog that persists to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, with admin token initialization from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useCounter.ts: Custom React hooks for fetching and incrementing a counter value from the backend canister using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageUpload.ts: Custom React hooks for uploading images to the backend and fetching all stored images with metadata using ExternalBlob and React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: Custom React hooks for fetching leaderboard entries and adding new entries to the backend using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Custom React hooks for fetching and saving the authenticated caller's user profile from the backend canister.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors, including chart colors and sidebar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining a dark-mode-enabled design system with custom color tokens using OKLCH color space, extended typography, container queries, animations, custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), and responsive breakpoints.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a 'Caffeine Capability Test' single-page app with 11 feature test cards demonstrating Internet Computer platform capabilities including Motoko backend integration, Internet Identity authentication, cross-device sync, leaderboard, file uploads, and honest status badges for each feature.
